The '''Last Stand Casino''' was located in [[Ord Mynock Freeport]]. It was housed in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]-era fort, which was the original government building. Because of this, the owner, [[Mortimon Galli]], kept the pre-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] appearance of dim lighting with many old wooden tables and chairs. Games of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] and other forms of gambling were always taking place in the back. It was the perfect place for clandestine meetings, a good game of sabacc and getting to know the real denizens of [[Ord Mynock Freeport]].<ref name="Game" />

{{Struct-stub}}
